app.title: Show HN: Stop paying for Dropbox/Google Drive, use your own S3 bucket instead
app.author: Zm44
proposed_tests: Install locker CLI and create an S3 bucket
Upload a file to S3 using the locker CLI
Check bucket policy permissions for a user account
